senses.gloss: to rumble, to roar, to shout, to rut, to bubble, to growl, to bray, to swirl, to come off noisily (human, beast, sea, cannon, whatever)
to seethe, to boil, to simmer, to scald

examples.text: إِذَا هَدَرَ الْعَصِيرَ رَأَيْتَهُمْ حُمْرًا عُيُونُهُمُ مِنَ الْمُسْطَارِ
examples.english: When they seethe the juice you see them red in the eyes from the defrutum.

senses.gloss: to be spilled, to run off, to go amiss, to vanish to no avail, to go for nothing

examples.text: الْحَنَفِيَّةُ فِي الْمَطْبَخِ تَقْطُرُ، مِمَّا يَهْدِرُ الْمَاءُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
examples.english: The faucet in the kitchen drips, wasting water every day.

senses.gloss: to rumble, to roar, to shout, to rut, to growl
